title: Stassia Classic

|conflict=[[TransGal circuit]]<ref name="TransGal">Per {{DB|character|serjixarrogantus|Arrogantus, Serji-X}}, [[Serji-X Arrogantus]] raced in the [[Swo-O'Rim racing circuit]]. {{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|sports/1352_1.html|Ominaz Keeps Top Ranking}} stated that the race on [[Corulag]] was a race in which both [[TransGal circuit]] and Swo-O'Rim teams competed. It also established that [[Ignar Ominaz]] and Arrogantus were in different circuits; therefore, [[Team Millennium Holos]] had to compete in TransGal.</ref>

{{Quote|While Ominaz won't see action until the Stassia Classic, Arrogantus will look to claim the top seed next month on Corsin at the Plooriod 940.|HoloNet News article spotlighting Ignar Ominaz, a member of Team Millennium Holos|<ref name="Article" />}}
The '''Stassia Classic''' was a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop race]] that was part of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]]<ref name="Article" /> [[TransGal circuit]].<ref name="TransGal" /> Hosted on [[Stassia]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] known for swoop races,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|190|Stassia}}</ref> it was preceded by a [[Tasjon swoop race|race]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] and took place after a respite period for the circuit, the [[racsan break]]. After they emerged victorious on Corulag<ref name="Article" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> the professional swoop jockeys of [[Team Millennium Holos]], including [[Ignar Ominaz]], planned to compete in the Stassia Classic.<ref name="Article" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Stassia Classic was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 54|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #54]], an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|website]] issue<ref name="Article" /> published on [[May 2]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN54 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6682683|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-02|time=5:53 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] wrote the site content.<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
